rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Respect AADL scope rules: component type contracts use visible inputs/outputs, implementation contracts use subcomponent ports and connections
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes
Do not introduce package-qualified names or types not present in the analyzed model
Ensure AGREE contracts reflect the actual AADL architecture structure and scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Implementation-level assignments must reference existing output features or declared variables
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AGREE contract generation and fusion logic
